P0200F_OTHR_ALARM_IND P0200F Other Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often an other type of alarm was used to monitor resident movement and
alert staff. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily effective 10/01/2017
701 GG0100A_PRIOR_SELF_CARE_IND GG0100A_PRIOR_SELF_CARE_IND GG0100A Prior Self Care Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's need for assistance with bathing dressing using the t 3 = Independent - Resident completed the activities
